label: FACIS SFTP — Bronze Envelope
info:
Builds the 6-field Bronze envelope per record, byte-equivalent to
sftp_poller.py:163-172.

Field order matters for any downstream consumer that hashes or diffs the
serialised envelope:
  1. ingest_timestamp
  2. source_topic
  3. kafka_partition (always 0)
  4. kafka_offset    (always 0)
  5. kafka_key
  6. raw_payload     (JSON.stringify(record))

name: bronze envelope builder
